genoprobe

Getting started

  • Installation
  • Quick start

Command reference

  • targets — Define probe-design target regions
  • probes — Generate probe candidates
  • screen — Off-target screening
  • panels — Assemble final probe panels
  • index — Build a Fulgor index

Background

  • Profiles
  • Thermodynamics

genoprobe
  • Python API reference
  • View page source

Python API reference

genoprobe exposes its core logic as importable Python modules. All public symbols are importable directly from their respective modules.

Modules

  • genoprobe.probes

  • genoprobe.thermo

  • genoprobe.genome

  • genoprobe.annotation

  • genoprobe.matching

  • genoprobe.panels

  • genoprobe.indexing

  • genoprobe.paths

  • genoprobe.profile_defaults

genoprobe.probes

Probe candidate generation — blockParse logic ported to Python 3.

class genoprobe.probes.ProbeCandidate(sequence: 'str', target_name: 'str', start: 'int', end: 'int', tm: 'float', gc: 'float', entropy: 'float', self_comp_total: 'int', self_comp_run: 'int', hairpin_tm: 'float', homodimer_tm: 'float', score: 'float' = 0.0, passes_filters: 'bool' = True, fail_reason: 'str' = '')[source]

Bases: object

Parameters:

  • sequence (str)

  • target_name (str)

  • start (int)

  • end (int)

  • tm (float)

  • gc (float)

  • entropy (float)

  • self_comp_total (int)

  • self_comp_run (int)

  • hairpin_tm (float)

  • homodimer_tm (float)

  • score (float)

  • passes_filters (bool)

  • fail_reason (str)

sequence: str
target_name: str
start: int
end: int
tm: float
gc: float
entropy: float
self_comp_total: int
self_comp_run: int
hairpin_tm: float
homodimer_tm: float
score: float
passes_filters: bool
fail_reason: str
property length: int
class genoprobe.probes.ProbeDesignConfig(min_probe_length: 'int' = 36, max_probe_length: 'int' = 41, min_tm: 'float' = 42.0, max_tm: 'float' = 47.0, min_gc: 'float' = 20.0, max_gc: 'float' = 75.0, max_homopolymer_run: 'int' = 4, max_dinucleotide_run: 'int | None' = 4, min_sequence_entropy: 'float | None' = 0.6, max_self_complementarity: 'int | None' = 14, max_contiguous_self_complementarity: 'int | None' = 6, max_hairpin_tm: 'float | None' = None, max_homodimer_tm: 'float | None' = None, probe_spacing: 'int' = 0, prohibited_sequences: 'tuple[str, ...]' = ('AAAAA', 'TTTTT', 'CCCCC', 'GGGGG'), thermo_penalty_weight: 'float' = 0.15, thermo_backend: 'str' = 'basic', monovalent_mm: 'float' = 390.0, probe_conc_nm: 'float' = 50.0, formamide_pct: 'float' = 50.0)[source]

Bases: object

Parameters:

  • min_probe_length (int)

  • max_probe_length (int)

  • min_tm (float)

  • max_tm (float)

  • min_gc (float)

  • max_gc (float)

  • max_homopolymer_run (int)

  • max_dinucleotide_run (int | None)

  • min_sequence_entropy (float | None)

  • max_self_complementarity (int | None)

  • max_contiguous_self_complementarity (int | None)

  • max_hairpin_tm (float | None)

  • max_homodimer_tm (float | None)

  • probe_spacing (int)

  • prohibited_sequences (tuple[str, ...])

  • thermo_penalty_weight (float)

  • thermo_backend (str)

  • monovalent_mm (float)

  • probe_conc_nm (float)

  • formamide_pct (float)

min_probe_length: int = 36
max_probe_length: int = 41
min_tm: float = 42.0
max_tm: float = 47.0
min_gc: float = 20.0
max_gc: float = 75.0
max_homopolymer_run: int = 4
max_dinucleotide_run: int | None = 4
min_sequence_entropy: float | None = 0.6
max_self_complementarity: int | None = 14
max_contiguous_self_complementarity: int | None = 6
max_hairpin_tm: float | None = None
max_homodimer_tm: float | None = None
probe_spacing: int = 0
prohibited_sequences: tuple[str, ...] = ('AAAAA', 'TTTTT', 'CCCCC', 'GGGGG')
thermo_penalty_weight: float = 0.15
thermo_backend: str = 'basic'
monovalent_mm: float = 390.0
probe_conc_nm: float = 50.0
formamide_pct: float = 50.0
genoprobe.probes.generate_candidates(sequence, target_name, config)[source]

Sliding-window probe candidate generation with thermodynamic filtering.

Parameters:

  • sequence (str)

  • target_name (str)

  • config (ProbeDesignConfig)

Return type:

list[ProbeCandidate]

genoprobe.thermo

Thermodynamic heuristics for probe scoring.

genoprobe.thermo.gc_content(seq)[source]
Parameters:

seq (str)

Return type:

float

genoprobe.thermo.basic_tm(seq, monovalent_mm=390.0)[source]

Salt-adjusted Tm using the Wallace rule for short oligos.

Parameters:

  • seq (str)

  • monovalent_mm (float)

Return type:

float

genoprobe.thermo.nn_tm(seq, monovalent_mm=390.0, probe_conc_nm=50.0)[source]

Nearest-neighbour Tm (SantaLucia 1998) with method-5 salt correction.

probe_conc_nm is the total strand concentration (probe + target). Salt correction follows SantaLucia 1998 / Biopython method 5: ΔS_salt = 0.368 × (n−1) × ln([Na+] in M), added directly to ΔS.

Parameters:

  • seq (str)

  • monovalent_mm (float)

  • probe_conc_nm (float)

Return type:

float

genoprobe.thermo.sequence_entropy(seq)[source]

Shannon entropy of nucleotide composition, normalised 0–1.

Parameters:

seq (str)

Return type:

float

genoprobe.thermo.self_complementarity(seq)[source]

Return (total_complementary_bases, max_contiguous_run) vs reverse complement.

Parameters:

seq (str)

Return type:

tuple[int, int]

genoprobe.thermo.hairpin_tm(seq, monovalent_mm=390.0, probe_conc_nm=50.0)[source]

Estimate hairpin melting temperature from the most stable stem.

Parameters:

  • seq (str)

  • monovalent_mm (float)

  • probe_conc_nm (float)

Return type:

float

genoprobe.thermo.homodimer_tm(seq, monovalent_mm=390.0, probe_conc_nm=50.0)[source]

Estimate homodimer Tm from self-complementarity.

Parameters:

  • seq (str)

  • monovalent_mm (float)

  • probe_conc_nm (float)

Return type:

float

genoprobe.thermo.heterodimer_tm(seq_a, seq_b, monovalent_mm=390.0, probe_conc_nm=50.0)[source]

Estimate worst-case heterodimer Tm between two probe sequences.

Parameters:

  • seq_a (str)

  • seq_b (str)

  • monovalent_mm (float)

  • probe_conc_nm (float)

Return type:

float

genoprobe.thermo.calc_tm(seq, backend='basic', monovalent_mm=390.0, probe_conc_nm=50.0, formamide_pct=50.0)[source]

Calculate Tm with salt and formamide correction.

The formamide correction (-0.72 °C per % formamide) is applied after the NN Tm, matching the blockParse / OligoMiner convention.

Parameters:

  • seq (str)

  • backend (str)

  • monovalent_mm (float)

  • probe_conc_nm (float)

  • formamide_pct (float)

Return type:

float

genoprobe.genome

FASTA genome handling via pyfaidx.

class genoprobe.genome.GenomeRecord(name: 'str', sequence: 'str', source_file: 'Path')[source]

Bases: object

Parameters:

  • name (str)

  • sequence (str)

  • source_file (Path)

name: str
sequence: str
source_file: Path
property length: int
genoprobe.genome.load_fasta(path)[source]
Parameters:

path (str | Path)

Return type:

Fasta

genoprobe.genome.iter_sequences(fasta, source)[source]
Parameters:

  • fasta (Fasta)

  • source (Path)

Return type:

Iterator[GenomeRecord]

genoprobe.genome.load_genomes(paths)[source]

Load all sequences from one or more FASTA files.

Parameters:

paths (list[str | Path])

Return type:

list[GenomeRecord]

genoprobe.genome.extract_region(fasta, seqid, start, end)[source]

Extract sequence for a genomic region (1-based, inclusive).

Parameters:

  • fasta (Fasta)

  • seqid (str)

  • start (int)

  • end (int)

Return type:

str

genoprobe.genome.count_kmers(sequence, k=18)[source]

Count all k-mers in a sequence.

Parameters:

  • sequence (str)

  • k (int)

Return type:

dict[str, int]

genoprobe.genome.build_kmer_index(records, k=18)[source]

Build a genome-wide k-mer frequency index across all records.

Parameters:

  • records (list[GenomeRecord])

  • k (int)

Return type:

dict[str, int]

genoprobe.genome.query_kmer_frequency(index, sequence, k=18)[source]

Return the maximum k-mer frequency for any k-mer in the sequence.

Parameters:

  • index (dict[str, int])

  • sequence (str)

  • k (int)

Return type:

int

genoprobe.annotation

GFF3 and GTF annotation parser with auto-format detection.

class genoprobe.annotation.AnnotationRecord(seqid: 'str', source: 'str', feature: 'str', start: 'int', end: 'int', score: 'str', strand: 'str', phase: 'str', attributes: 'dict[str, str]' = <factory>)[source]

Bases: object

Parameters:

  • seqid (str)

  • source (str)

  • feature (str)

  • start (int)

  • end (int)

  • score (str)

  • strand (str)

  • phase (str)

  • attributes (dict[str, str])

seqid: str
source: str
feature: str
start: int
end: int
score: str
strand: str
phase: str
attributes: dict[str, str]
property length: int
get_attr(key, default='')[source]
Parameters:

  • key (str)

  • default (str)

Return type:

str

genoprobe.annotation.detect_format(path)[source]

Return ‘gff3’ or ‘gtf’ based on file extension and content.

Parameters:

path (Path)

Return type:

str

genoprobe.annotation.load_annotation(path, *, features=None)[source]

Load all annotation records, optionally filtered to specific feature types.

Parameters:

  • path (str | Path)

  • features (list[str] | None)

Return type:

list[AnnotationRecord]

genoprobe.annotation.summarize_annotation(records)[source]

Return feature type → count mapping for a list of records.

Parameters:

records (list[AnnotationRecord])

Return type:

dict[str, int]

genoprobe.matching

Pure-Python mismatch-tolerant sequence matching for off-target screening.

class genoprobe.matching.MatchHit(subject_name: 'str', position: 'int', mismatches: 'int', strand: 'str')[source]

Bases: object

Parameters:

  • subject_name (str)

  • position (int)

  • mismatches (int)

  • strand (str)

subject_name: str
position: int
mismatches: int
strand: str
class genoprobe.matching.MatchSummary(query: 'str', on_target_hits: 'list[MatchHit]' = <factory>, off_target_hits: 'list[MatchHit]' = <factory>)[source]

Bases: object

Parameters:

  • query (str)

  • on_target_hits (list[MatchHit])

  • off_target_hits (list[MatchHit])

query: str
on_target_hits: list[MatchHit]
off_target_hits: list[MatchHit]
property on_target_score: float
property off_target_score: float
genoprobe.matching.reverse_complement(seq)[source]
Parameters:

seq (str)

Return type:

str

genoprobe.matching.count_mismatches(query, subject_window)[source]
Parameters:

  • query (str)

  • subject_window (str)

Return type:

int

genoprobe.matching.find_hits(query, subject, subject_name, max_mismatches=2)[source]

Find all approximate matches of query in subject (both strands).

Parameters:

  • query (str)

  • subject (str)

  • subject_name (str)

  • max_mismatches (int)

Return type:

list[MatchHit]

genoprobe.matching.mismatch_support(mismatches, penalty_per)[source]
Parameters:

  • mismatches (int)

  • penalty_per (float)

Return type:

float

genoprobe.panels

Final probe selection and panel assembly.

class genoprobe.panels.PanelConfig(max_probes_per_target: 'int' = 50, max_panel_contiguous_complementarity: 'int | None' = 7, max_panel_heterodimer_tm: 'float | None' = None, panel_complementarity_penalty_weight: 'float' = 0.15, panel_heterodimer_penalty_weight: 'float' = 0.0)[source]

Bases: object

Parameters:

  • max_probes_per_target (int)

  • max_panel_contiguous_complementarity (int | None)

  • max_panel_heterodimer_tm (float | None)

  • panel_complementarity_penalty_weight (float)

  • panel_heterodimer_penalty_weight (float)

max_probes_per_target: int = 50
max_panel_contiguous_complementarity: int | None = 7
max_panel_heterodimer_tm: float | None = None
panel_complementarity_penalty_weight: float = 0.15
panel_heterodimer_penalty_weight: float = 0.0
class genoprobe.panels.PanelResult(target_name: 'str', selected_probes: 'list[ProbeCandidate]', config: 'PanelConfig', screened: 'bool' = False)[source]

Bases: object

Parameters:

  • target_name (str)

  • selected_probes (list[ProbeCandidate])

  • config (PanelConfig)

  • screened (bool)

target_name: str
selected_probes: list[ProbeCandidate]
config: PanelConfig
screened: bool = False
property probe_count: int
genoprobe.panels.assemble_panel(candidates, target_name, config)[source]

Greedy panel assembly: iteratively add highest-scoring non-penalised probes.

Parameters:

  • candidates (list[ProbeCandidate])

  • target_name (str)

  • config (PanelConfig)

Return type:

PanelResult

genoprobe.indexing

Optional Fulgor-based off-target index management.

genoprobe.indexing.find_fulgor()[source]
Return type:

Path | None

genoprobe.indexing.find_ggcat()[source]
Return type:

Path | None

genoprobe.indexing.require_fulgor()[source]
Return type:

Path

genoprobe.indexing.build_fulgor_index(fasta_paths, output_dir, *, kmer_length=31, minimizer_length=20, threads=4)[source]

Build a Fulgor index from a list of FASTA files. Returns the index path.

Parameters:

  • fasta_paths (list[Path])

  • output_dir (Path)

  • kmer_length (int)

  • minimizer_length (int)

  • threads (int)

Return type:

Path

genoprobe.indexing.query_fulgor_index(index_path, probe_sequences, *, threads=4)[source]

Query a Fulgor index with probe sequences. Returns probe → list of genome indices.

Parameters:

  • index_path (Path)

  • probe_sequences (list[str])

  • threads (int)

Return type:

dict[str, list[int]]
